notes_for_next_session:
FOR MIDDAY AGENT (Mon 2026-06-29). Market open play complete.

BOOK STATE: Flat. 20 consecutive no-entry sessions. Equity 9,938.80. 0 open positions.

SPY REGIME: DOWN (EMA-9 737.22 < EMA-21 740.10). Cap at 5 positions remains.

OPEN PLAY OUTCOME: Zero entries from 6 candidates. ALL rejected:
- PANW (PRIMARY, pm_rsi=57): live RSI=70.9 at open — classic gap-up trap. Also rel_vol=0.667 (<1.3) and MACD not rising. 3 failures.
- AMGN (SECONDARY, pm_rsi=58): live RSI=70.8 at open — same gap-up trap. Also atr_pct=0.135 (<0.30 floor) and no breakout above prev_day_high 362.01. 5 failures.

KEY PATTERN: Opening bar continues to spike RSI past 60 ceiling for any strong premarket name. Even PANW (pm_rsi=57, the cleanest candidate) surged to RSI=70.9 on the open bar. This is the 6th+ consecutive session where the gap-up trap plays out at open.

IF MIDDAY AGENT EVALUATES ENTRIES: Same 6 names on watchlist. Only valid if a sustained intraday PULLBACK brings RSI to 55-60 range with rel_vol ≥ 1.3 AND price re-establishes above prior day high. ATR% floor 0.30 remains hard — AMGN, ES, MGM, EIX, D have all been consistently below 0.16% and remain structural skips unless ATR expands. PANW at 0.357% is the only name with adequate ATR — watch for RSI pullback to 57-60 with MACD turning positive.
